:mod:`The LonDimension class`
=============================

.. module:: slicer.cf10

.. versionadded:: 0.1
.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

.. class:: LonDimension(IndexedDimension)

Summary
-------

    The LonDimension class inherits from IndexedDimension and specializes the
    method __call__ to deal with the special case for longitudes of overlapping.
    If the values requested define an interval which overlaps the limits of the 
    dimension and the dimension is global (360 degrees), __call__ returns two
    slices instead of one, in order to deal with the overlapping of memory.

    The private method **adjust_values** deals with different representations of
    longitude, normalizes longitudes and detects overlapping. An interval of {340,-40}
    is valid for this dimension.
